ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stocks are traded */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "unadjusted_price" TEXT /* Unadjusted price of the stock */,
  "putthrough" INTEGER /* Put-through of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" TEXT /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" TEXT /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price of the stock */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "high_52_week" TEXT /* Highest price in the last 52 weeks */,
  "low_52_week" TEXT /* Lowest price in the last 52 weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being monitored */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_value" TEXT /* Value for the alert condition */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume, news) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Last time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
